## Bug Description

**Which course?** (e.g., math-quadratic-function, bio-meiosis, etc.)
**Which section?** (e.g., Module 2, Post-test question 3, etc.)

## Type of Issue

- [ ] **Content Error** — Incorrect information, wrong formula, factual mistake
- [ ] **Instructional Design** — Poor pedagogy, missing scaffolding, unclear explanation
- [ ] **UI/UX Bug** — Layout broken, interaction not working, responsive issue
- [ ] **Accessibility** — Screen reader, keyboard navigation, color contrast

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open `examples/___/index.html`
2. Navigate to ___
3. Click/interact with ___
4. See the issue

## Expected Behavior

(What should happen instead?)

## Screenshots

(If applicable, add screenshots)

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17)
- **Screen Size**: (e.g., Desktop, Tablet, Mobile)
